---
title: "Blogs"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
format: 
  html: 
    theme: lux 
    css: styles/styles.css
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

### 2026 May ![](blogs/may_greenhouse.jpg)

Taking data in greenhouse

### 2026 April ![](blogs/april_watering.jpg)

Watering plants in greenhouse

### 2026 March

### 2026 February

### 2026 January

### 2017 October![](blogs/ceske_budejovice.jpg)

Ceske Budejovice, Czech Republic
